case_title: SABAL FINANCIAL GROUP, L.P. VS. NEW HORIZON REALITY LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABAL FINANCIAL GROUP, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, JOCELYN NEW HORIZON REALITY LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
